audit_items.proof_trace: The allowance requirement is enforced unconditionally at L453 via `IERC20(assetOut).safeTransferFrom(msg.sender, address(this), assetOutAmount)`, which reverts if allowance < assetOutAmount. The callback at L448-450 is an intentional flash-swap mechanism allowing bidders to acquire and approve assetOut within the same transaction; the reentrancy guard (`s_entered`) prevents any nested `bid` calls during the callback. The property assertion (allowance >= assetOutAmount at safeTransferFrom time) holds by construction.
